description: Calculate photography gear depreciation for tax purposes using the provided equipment data. Determine the asset age, depreciation, and current book value for each item based on its equipment type. Identify all assets where the market value exceeds the book value as candidates for sale.

natural_language.prompt: You are a professional photographer preparing tax documents. Your gear inventory has inconsistent date formats and missing prices. Calculate depreciation using straight-line method: cameras depreciate over 5 years, lenses over 7 years, accessories and computers over 3 years. Identify equipment worth more than book value (sell candidates).
